Third Party Integration

This guide will walk you through how to integrate third-party services with the AIBuds SDK.

Third Party Manager​

The AIBudsThirdPartyManager is the main class for third-party integration functionality:

Objective-C​

// Get the third party manager singleton
AIBudsThirdPartyManager *thirdPartyManager = AIBudsThirdPartyManager.shared;

Swift​

// Get the third party manager singleton
let thirdPartyManager = AIBudsThirdPartyManager.shared

Available Third Party Integrations​

The AIBuds SDK supports integration with several third-party services:

StarburstSdk​

StarburstSdk provides advanced AI capabilities for audio processing and voice recognition:

Objective-C​

// Initialize StarburstSdk
[thirdPartyManager initializeStarburstSdkWithAppKey:@"YOUR_STARBURST_APP_KEY" completion:^(BOOL success, NSError *error) {
    if (success) {
        NSLog(@"StarburstSdk initialized successfully");
    } else {
        NSLog(@"Failed to initialize StarburstSdk: %@", error.localizedDescription);
    }
}];

// Enable StarburstSdk
[thirdPartyManager setStarburstSdkEnabled:YES];

Swift​

// Initialize StarburstSdk
thirdPartyManager.initializeStarburstSdk(withAppKey: "YOUR_STARBURST_APP_KEY") { success, error in
    if success {
        print("StarburstSdk initialized successfully")
    } else {
        print("Failed to initialize StarburstSdk: \(error?.localizedDescription ?? "Unknown error")")
    }
}

// Enable StarburstSdk
thirdPartyManager.setStarburstSdkEnabled(true)

MagicHelper​

MagicHelper provides additional AI capabilities and voice assistant features:

Objective-C​

// Initialize MagicHelper
[thirdPartyManager initializeMagicHelperWithAppKey:@"YOUR_MAGIC_HELPER_APP_KEY" completion:^(BOOL success, NSError *error) {
    if (success) {
        NSLog(@"MagicHelper initialized successfully");
    } else {
        NSLog(@"Failed to initialize MagicHelper: %@", error.localizedDescription);
    }
}];

// Enable MagicHelper
[thirdPartyManager setMagicHelperEnabled:YES];

Swift​

// Initialize MagicHelper
thirdPartyManager.initializeMagicHelper(withAppKey: "YOUR_MAGIC_HELPER_APP_KEY") { success, error in
    if success {
        print("MagicHelper initialized successfully")
    } else {
        print("Failed to initialize MagicHelper: \(error?.localizedDescription ?? "Unknown error")")
    }
}

// Enable MagicHelper
thirdPartyManager.setMagicHelperEnabled(true)

MZEncryptSDK​

MZEncryptSDK provides encryption capabilities for secure communication:

Objective-C​

// Initialize MZEncryptSDK
[thirdPartyManager initializeMZEncryptSDKWithAppKey:@"YOUR_MZ_ENCRYPT_APP_KEY" completion:^(BOOL success, NSError *error) {
    if (success) {
        NSLog(@"MZEncryptSDK initialized successfully");
    } else {
        NSLog(@"Failed to initialize MZEncryptSDK: %@", error.localizedDescription);
    }
}];

// Enable MZEncryptSDK
[thirdPartyManager setMZEncryptSDKEnabled:YES];

Swift​

// Initialize MZEncryptSDK
thirdPartyManager.initializeMZEncryptSDK(withAppKey: "YOUR_MZ_ENCRYPT_APP_KEY") { success, error in
    if success {
        print("MZEncryptSDK initialized successfully")
    } else {
        print("Failed to initialize MZEncryptSDK: \(error?.localizedDescription ?? "Unknown error")")
    }
}

// Enable MZEncryptSDK
thirdPartyManager.setMZEncryptSDKEnabled(true)

Custom Third Party Integrations​

You can create custom third-party integrations:

Objective-C​

// Create custom third party integration
AIBudsThirdPartyIntegration *integration = [[AIBudsThirdPartyIntegration alloc] initWithName:@"MyCustomIntegration"];

// Set initialization block
integration.initializationBlock = ^(NSString *appKey, void (^completion)(BOOL, NSError *)) {
    // Initialize your custom integration
    // ...
    completion(YES, nil);
};

// Set enable block
integration.enableBlock = ^(BOOL enable) {
    // Enable or disable your custom integration
    // ...
};

// Register custom integration
[thirdPartyManager registerThirdPartyIntegration:integration];

// Initialize custom integration
[thirdPartyManager initializeThirdPartyIntegration:@"MyCustomIntegration" withAppKey:@"YOUR_APP_KEY" completion:^(BOOL success, NSError *error) {
    if (success) {
        NSLog(@"Custom integration initialized successfully");
    } else {
        NSLog(@"Failed to initialize custom integration: %@", error.localizedDescription);
    }
}];

// Enable custom integration
[thirdPartyManager setThirdPartyIntegrationEnabled:YES forName:@"MyCustomIntegration"];

Swift​

// Create custom third party integration
let integration = AIBudsThirdPartyIntegration(name: "MyCustomIntegration")

// Set initialization block
integration.initializationBlock = { appKey, completion in
    // Initialize your custom integration
    // ...
    completion(true, nil)
}

// Set enable block
integration.enableBlock = { enable in
    // Enable or disable your custom integration
    // ...
}

// Register custom integration
thirdPartyManager.registerThirdPartyIntegration(integration)

// Initialize custom integration
thirdPartyManager.initializeThirdPartyIntegration("MyCustomIntegration", withAppKey: "YOUR_APP_KEY") { success, error in
    if success {
        print("Custom integration initialized successfully")
    } else {
        print("Failed to initialize custom integration: \(error?.localizedDescription ?? "Unknown error")")
    }
}

// Enable custom integration
thirdPartyManager.setThirdPartyIntegrationEnabled(true, forName: "MyCustomIntegration")

Third Party Configuration​

You can configure third-party services:

Objective-C​

// Configure StarburstSdk
NSDictionary *starburstConfig = @{
    @"apiUrl": @"https://api.starburst.example.com",
    @"timeout": @(30.0),
    @"retryAttempts": @(3)
};
[thirdPartyManager configureStarburstSdkWithConfig:starburstConfig];

// Configure MagicHelper
NSDictionary *magicHelperConfig = @{
    @"apiUrl": @"https://api.magichelp.example.com",
    @"timeout": @(30.0),
    @"retryAttempts": @(3)
};
[thirdPartyManager configureMagicHelperWithConfig:magicHelperConfig];

// Configure MZEncryptSDK
NSDictionary *mzEncryptConfig = @{
    @"encryptionAlgorithm": @"AES-256",
    @"keySize": @(256),
    @"ivSize": @(16)
};
[thirdPartyManager configureMZEncryptSDKWithConfig:mzEncryptConfig];

Swift​

// Configure StarburstSdk
let starburstConfig: [String: Any] = [
    "apiUrl": "https://api.starburst.example.com",
    "timeout": 30.0,
    "retryAttempts": 3
]
thirdPartyManager.configureStarburstSdk(withConfig: starburstConfig)

// Configure MagicHelper
let magicHelperConfig: [String: Any] = [
    "apiUrl": "https://api.magichelp.example.com",
    "timeout": 30.0,
    "retryAttempts": 3
]
thirdPartyManager.configureMagicHelper(withConfig: magicHelperConfig)

// Configure MZEncryptSDK
let mzEncryptConfig: [String: Any] = [
    "encryptionAlgorithm": "AES-256",
    "keySize": 256,
    "ivSize": 16
]
thirdPartyManager.configureMZEncryptSDK(withConfig: mzEncryptConfig)

Third Party Status​

You can check the status of third-party services:

Objective-C​

// Check StarburstSdk status
AIBudsThirdPartyStatus starburstStatus = [thirdPartyManager getStarburstSdkStatus];
NSLog(@"StarburstSdk status: %ld", (long)starburstStatus);

// Check MagicHelper status
AIBudsThirdPartyStatus magicHelperStatus = [thirdPartyManager getMagicHelperStatus];
NSLog(@"MagicHelper status: %ld", (long)magicHelperStatus);

// Check MZEncryptSDK status
AIBudsThirdPartyStatus mzEncryptStatus = [thirdPartyManager getMZEncryptSDKStatus];
NSLog(@"MZEncryptSDK status: %ld", (long)mzEncryptStatus);

// Available statuses:
// AIBudsThirdPartyStatusNotInitialized - Not initialized
// AIBudsThirdPartyStatusInitializing - Initializing
// AIBudsThirdPartyStatusInitialized - Initialized
// AIBudsThirdPartyStatusError - Error

Swift​

// Check StarburstSdk status
let starburstStatus = thirdPartyManager.getStarburstSdkStatus()
print("StarburstSdk status: \(starburstStatus)")

// Check MagicHelper status
let magicHelperStatus = thirdPartyManager.getMagicHelperStatus()
print("MagicHelper status: \(magicHelperStatus)")

// Check MZEncryptSDK status
let mzEncryptStatus = thirdPartyManager.getMZEncryptSDKStatus()
print("MZEncryptSDK status: \(mzEncryptStatus)")

// Available statuses:
// .notInitialized - Not initialized
// .initializing - Initializing
// .initialized - Initialized
// .error - Error

Troubleshooting Third Party Integrations​

Common Issues​

  1. Initialization Failed

    • Check that you're using the correct app key
    • Verify that the third-party service is reachable
    • Ensure you have a valid internet connection

  2. Service Not Responding

    • Check your network connection
    • Verify that the third-party service is operational
    • Check for service outages or maintenance

  3. Authentication Errors

    • Verify that your app key is valid and not expired
    • Check that you have the necessary permissions

  4. Performance Issues

    • Check network latency
    • Verify that the third-party service is not rate limiting your requests
    • Consider caching responses for frequently used data
